description: Quan ly tai khoan, nhom, don vi, admin, log, bieu tuong, ket noi lien thong

features.name: Quan ly tai khoan nguoi dung
features.scope: Quan tri he thong, Lanh dao, Chuyen vien - Tao, sua, xoa, khoa/mo khoa tai khoan
business_rules: Moi tai khoan co vai tro duoc gan truoc
Tai khoan phai duoc phe duyet truoc khi hoat dong

features.name: Quan ly nhom nguoi dung
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Tao/sua/xoa nhom, gan thanh vien
business_rules: Cap quyen tu dong theo vai tro nhom

features.name: Quan ly don vi
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Quan ly don vi Cuc, Chi cuc, Cang vu, TCT
business_rules: Don vi co he thung cap phat
Moi don vi co admin rieng
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly thong tin don vi

features.name: Quan ly tai khoan admin
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Tao, phe duyet, khoa, phan quyen admin
business_rules: Admin 3 muc: thuong, su dung, van hanh
Moi admin co quyen gioi han
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly toan bo tai khoan admin

features.name: Quan ly log truy cap
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Tra cuu 5 nhom log (truy cap, dang nhap, loi, tai khoan, cau hinh)
business_rules: 5 truong: thoi diem, phan nhom, mo ta, doi tuong, muc do

features.name: Quan ly bieu tuong ban do
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Quan ly bieu tuong doi tuong GIS tren ban do
business_rules: Bieu tuong theo tung loai doi tuong
acceptance_criteria: Gan bieu tuong cho doi tuong GIS

features.name: Quan ly ket noi lien thong chia du lieu
features.scope: Quan tri he thong - Cau hinh ket noi LGSP, NDXP, API
business_rules: JWT xac thuc cho moi ket noi
IP whitelist de kiem soat truy cap
acceptance_criteria: Cau hinh ket noi thanh cong
Cap nhat thong tin ket noi
